purpose: One corrected live interface qualification probe for the R3 decision-reset candidate.
claims_allowed: LIVE_INTERFACE lifecycle was observed or was blocked by an explicitly recorded infrastructure failure.
The corrected execution adapter did or did not produce a durable provider terminal receipt.
No Judge or formal-arm result was produced.
claims_forbidden: product quality based on this probe

authority.authorization_basis: William: continue, and authorize. Interpreted as the prior minimal qualification boundary bound to the corrected execution commit.
